abort.already_configured: This B-hyve account is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The B-hyve Auto Sprinklers Controller settings were updated successfully.
abort.reauth_successful: The B-hyve account was reconnected successfully.
abort.wrong_account: Reauthentication must use the same B-hyve account.

error.no_controllers: No B-hyve sprinkler controllers were found on this account.
error.controller_not_found: The configured B-hyve controller ID was not found on this account.

user.title: Connect to B-hyve
user.description: Enter your B-hyve email and password to connect your sprinkler account.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to B-hyve
reauth_confirm.description: Your B-hyve session needs updated credentials. Enter them below.

reconfigure.title: Sprinkler Settings
reconfigure.description: Adjust the optional controller device ID and planner location overrides. Weather sources and notification target stay on the B-hyve Account device configuration card.

data_description.controller_device_id: Optional: pin the integration to a specific B-hyve sprinkler controller device ID if your account has more than one controller.
data_description.planner_latitude: Optional: override Home Assistant's latitude for ET and watering-window calculations. Set both latitude and longitude or leave both blank to use your HA home location.
data_description.planner_longitude: Optional: override Home Assistant's longitude for sunrise-based watering-window calculations. Set both latitude and longitude or leave both blank to use your HA home location.

init.title: Planner Location
init.description: Set optional planner latitude and longitude overrides. Configure weather-source entities and the notification target from the B-hyve Account device configuration card.

data_description.planner_latitude: Optional: override Home Assistant's latitude for ET and watering-window calculations. Set both latitude and longitude or leave both blank to use your HA home location.
data_description.planner_longitude: Optional: override Home Assistant's longitude for sunrise-based watering-window calculations. Set both latitude and longitude or leave both blank to use your HA home location.
